text:
5th July 1959. when Rahu Bhulcti, Rahu Anthara
was operating: Swathi was the Nakshatra on that day.
Jupiter. the chief 90vernor for finance, is conjoined with Venus.
Jupiter will be favourable to you. As it was in Kethu's star Makam.. and
Kethu was in the 9th house. during Jupiter sub period. you will be
transferred to the north·east; you will be taken to the administrative
department and will become very popular. Actually, you were transferred
to the aCiministrative head office, in a town north-east of the place
where you were. and you became populaf. The offidats the colleagues
and all those with whom you have to come in contact will speak highly
of you for your straightforward. honest and fair dealings. Integrity and
sincerity stand to your credit.
Thus. it will be seen that:
(a) Rahu is the strongest benefic:
(b) Mercury gives you good oppottunlty to show you talent
during inspection:
(c) Mars adds authority and power:
(d) Venus bestows on you social and financial success;
